caveat: This is an offline historical approximation, not an exact replay of the live 5-minute pulse machine. It uses cached CoinGecko monthly windows and a machine-style score.

windows.label: Feb -> Mar
windows.method: Walk-forward: one prior month visible, next month hidden until scoring; BTC/ETH regime uses only prior month.

windows.label: Mar -> Apr
windows.method: Walk-forward: one prior month visible, next month hidden until scoring; BTC/ETH regime uses only prior month.

windows.label: Apr -> May
windows.method: Walk-forward: one prior month visible, next month hidden until scoring; BTC/ETH regime uses only prior month.

windows.label: May -> Jun
windows.method: Walk-forward: one prior month visible, next month hidden until scoring; BTC/ETH regime uses only prior month.
